strategies.label: Enable lifecycle cleanup for incomplete uploads

fields.description: Days after which incomplete multipart uploads are automatically cleaned up.
fields.impact_text: Incomplete multipart uploads older than the configured number of days will be automatically aborted.

dependency_checks.message: No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.
Downgrade to review_required_bundle when existing lifecycle rules are detected but the lifecycle document was not captured for additive review.

warnings: Lifecycle policy changes can affect storage behavior and cost.
strategies.impact_text: A lifecycle rule will abort incomplete multipart uploads after the configured number of days.
blocked_reasons: Lifecycle preservation evidence is missing for additive merge review.

strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded S3.11 strategy 's3_enable_abort_incomplete_uploads' because additive lifecycle preservation is under-proven. Lifecycle preservation evidence is missing for additive merge review. recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is low and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.60, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.
